title: Incident Investigation Demo
description: A scenario-driven demo showing how UModel enables AI Agent-assisted incident investigation. Features a payment gateway SLO breach caused by upstream retry storm during a promotion, with runbook-guided diagnostics.

scenario.title: Payment Gateway P99 Latency SLO Breach
scenario.timeline: T-24h: checkout retry config change → T-4h: promotion goes active → T-7min: SLO breach detected → T-0: investigation begins
scenario.root_cause: Upstream retry amplification (2→5 retries) × promotion traffic (3.5x) = 8.75x effective load on payment-gateway
scenario.red_herring: payment-gw v3.2.1 deployment 12h ago (trivial logging change)
scenario.resolution: Rollback cfg-checkout-retry via runbook tool rollback_config_change

seed_entities_note: display_name values for documentation; actual __entity_id__ values are 32-char MD5 hex of these semantic names
